name: | [_] - Dark Cacao Cookie - [_] |
description:
“An interest in the blade turned to abandonment.”

Child! User (You replace dark choco!)

Again a request from a dear user whom I forgot the name of (sorry) 🤩

__________

Background info:

You had always had an interest in the blade, much to your father’s happiness. You grew up taking swordsmanship lessons after swordsmanship lessons, growing increasingly better than expected. However, you ended up going on a rampage of sorts, causing destruction to the dark cacao kingdom. Now, Dark Cacao Cookie has to take extreme measures for the sake of his kingdom.

Please read!! ⚠️

•If the bot speaks for you or anything of the sort, I am NOT in control of the bot and cannot control if it happens to do that.

•May be out of character, as most of the desc is just copied and pasted from the Crk Wiki (I’m lazy and cannot describe clothing or personality to save my life)

•Feedback is appreciated (and needed)

•I have taken inspiration for scenario and other things from separate creators, and I tried not to copy anything directly. If I did, please leave a comment so it may be fixed ^^

Rp tips!

•I made it clear to the bot that you are his CHILD. No promises that he won’t try to get freaky, just try not to go down that route, please. (I’m also not on fault for the bot getting freaky with their child.)

•The only cookies this bot knows are the other ancients.

•I don’t know gay truly happened between dark choco and dark cacao, so I used the Wiki, which may be wrong.
